zh: 動畫，由許多連續的圖片組成。
en: Animation is made with many, many pictures called frames.
en_example: Animation is made with many, many pictures called frames.
zh_example: Animation is made with many, many pictures called frames.
ja: アニメーションは、多くの連続した画像で作られています。
ja_example: Animation is made with many, many pictures called frames.

zh: 影格，動畫中的單張圖片。
en: Each one of the frames is a little bit different from the one that comes right before it.
en_example: Each one of the frames is a little bit different from the one that comes right before it.
zh_example: Each one of the frames is a little bit different from the one that comes right before it.
ja: フレームは、アニメーションの中の一枚の画像です。
ja_example: Each one of the frames is a little bit different from the one that comes right before it.

zh: 定格動畫，透過逐格拍攝模型製作的動畫。
en: Stop motion is made by posing the model and taking pictures frame by frame.
en_example: Stop motion is made by posing the model and taking pictures frame by frame.
zh_example: Stop motion is made by posing the model and taking pictures frame by frame.
ja: ストップモーションは、モデルを少しずつ動かして写真を撮るアニメーション技法です。
ja_example: Stop motion is made by posing the model and taking pictures frame by frame.

zh: 黏土動畫，使用黏土製作角色並逐格拍攝的動畫。
en: Clay animation uses modeling clay to build and rebuild characters.
en_example: Clay animation uses modeling clay to build and rebuild characters.
zh_example: Clay animation uses modeling clay to build and rebuild characters.
ja: クレイアニメーションは、粘土でキャラクターを作り直しながら撮影する技法です。
ja_example: Clay animation uses modeling clay to build and rebuild characters.

zh: 數位木偶，電腦中製作的角色模型。
en: They make a computer model of a character, a sort of digital puppet.
en_example: They make a computer model of a character, a sort of digital puppet.
zh_example: They make a computer model of a character, a sort of digital puppet.
ja: デジタルパペットは、コンピューターで作られたキャラクターモデルです。
ja_example: They make a computer model of a character, a sort of digital puppet.

zh: 安全警報，用來保護財產安全的裝置。
en: The alarm was invented to keep houses, cars, and other valuable things safe and secure.
en_example: The alarm was invented to keep houses, cars, and other valuable things safe and secure.
zh_example: The alarm was invented to keep houses, cars, and other valuable things safe and secure.
ja: セキュリティアラームは、家や車などの貴重品を守るための装置です。
ja_example: The alarm was invented to keep houses, cars, and other valuable things safe and secure.

zh: 警報器，發出響聲的裝置。
en: The simplest alarm is a siren or light bulb connected by wires to a door or window.
en_example: The simplest alarm is a siren or light bulb connected by wires to a door or window.
zh_example: The simplest alarm is a siren or light bulb connected by wires to a door or window.
ja: サイレンは、警報のための音を出す装置です。
ja_example: The simplest alarm is a siren or light bulb connected by wires to a door or window.

zh: 第六感，超出五官感知的能力。
en: Cats and dogs have a sixth sense that we don't have.
en_example: Cats and dogs have a sixth sense that we don't have.
zh_example: Cats and dogs have a sixth sense that we don't have.
ja: 第六感は、五感を超えた感覚のことです。
ja_example: Cats and dogs have a sixth sense that we don't have.

zh: 秤，用來測量重量的工具。
en: Humans have had scales like this for more than 7,000 years.
en_example: Humans have had scales like this for more than 7,000 years.
zh_example: Humans have had scales like this for more than 7,000 years.
ja: スケールは、重さを測る道具です。
ja_example: Humans have had scales like this for more than 7,000 years.

en: Now you keep adding weights until the two sides balance.
en_example: Now you keep adding weights until the two sides balance.
zh_example: Now you keep adding weights until the two sides balance.
ja: バランスは、両側の重さが等しい状態です。
ja_example: Now you keep adding weights until the two sides balance.

en: Pets need to have a nutritious diet to be healthy.
en_example: Pets need to have a nutritious diet to be healthy.
zh_example: Pets need to have a nutritious diet to be healthy.
ja: 栄養のある食事は、健康のために必要です。
ja_example: Pets need to have a nutritious diet to be healthy.

en: Humans could see their reflection by looking into water long ago.
en_example: Humans could see their reflection by looking into water long ago.
zh_example: Humans could see their reflection by looking into water long ago.
ja: 反射は、鏡や水に映る像のことです。
ja_example: Humans could see their reflection by looking into water long ago.

zh: 鏡子，反射光線並顯示影像的物品。
en: A mirror reflects light and shows your reflection.
en_example: A mirror reflects light and shows your reflection.
zh_example: A mirror reflects light and shows your reflection.
ja: 鏡は光を反射し、映った像を見せるものです。
ja_example: A mirror reflects light and shows your reflection.

en: The mirror is scratched on the back, so it doesn't reflect well.
en_example: The mirror is scratched on the back, so it doesn't reflect well.
zh_example: The mirror is scratched on the back, so it doesn't reflect well.
ja: 傷は、表面にできた擦り傷のことです。
ja_example: The mirror is scratched on the back, so it doesn't reflect well.

zh: 塗層，覆蓋在物體表面的薄層。
en: People spray a special shiny coating on glass to make a mirror.
en_example: People spray a special shiny coating on glass to make a mirror.
zh_example: People spray a special shiny coating on glass to make a mirror.
ja: コーティングは、物の表面に塗る薄い層のことです。
ja_example: People spray a special shiny coating on glass to make a mirror.

en: You still have to handle mirrors carefully because they can easily scratch or break.
en_example: You still have to handle mirrors carefully because they can easily scratch or break.
zh_example: You still have to handle mirrors carefully because they can easily scratch or break.
ja: 慎重に扱うことは、物を壊さないために重要です。
ja_example: You still have to handle mirrors carefully because they can easily scratch or break.
